---
title: "Jason Soto"
subtitle: "Actuarial Science Major"
image: profile.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jsnsoto04
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jason-soto-6562963aa/
---

Just a simple site for my Modern Approaches to Data Analysis course.

“It's your life. Do what you want with it.”

― Kentaro Miura

## Education

Western High School \| Anaheim, CA \| August 2018 - May 2022

California State University, Fullerton \| Mathematics, Actuarial Science Concentration, B.A. \| August 2022 - May 2027

## Experience

Jack in the Box \| Cashier \| May 2022 - August 2022

Knott's Berry Farm \| Games Attendant \| February 2023 - March 2026
